problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: If Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
